2603.24570.title: Anti-I2V: Safeguarding your photos from malicious image-to-video generation
2603.24570.paper_summary: Advances in diffusion-based video generation models, while significantly improving human animation, poses threats of misuse through the creation of fake videos from a specific person's photo and text prompts. Recent efforts have focused on adversarial attacks that introduce crafted perturbations to protect images from diffusion-based models. However, most existing approaches target image generation, while relatively few explicitly address image-to-video diffusion models (VDMs), and most primarily focus on UNet-based architectures. Hence, their effectiveness against Diffusion Transformer (DiT) models remains largely under-explored, as these models demonstrate improved feature retention, and stronger temporal consistency due to larger capacity and advanced attention mechanisms. In this work, we introduce Anti-I2V, a novel defense against malicious human image-to-video generation, applicable across diverse diffusion backbones. Instead of restricting noise updates to the RGB space, Anti-I2V operates in both the $L$*$a$*$b$* and frequency domains, improving robustness and concentrating on salient pixels. We then identify the network layers that capture the most distinct semantic features during the denoising process to design appropriate training objectives that maximize degradation of temporal coherence and generation fidelity. Through extensive validation, Anti-I2V demonstrates state-of-the-art defense performance against diverse video diffusion models, offering an effective solution to the problem.
2603.24570.paper_summary_zh: 進展中的基於擴散的視頻生成模型，雖然顯著改善了人類動畫，但也帶來了通過特定人物的照片和文本提示創建假視頻的濫用威脅。最近的努力集中在對抗攻擊上，這些攻擊引入精心設計的擾動，以保護圖像免受基於擴散的模型的影響。然而，大多數現有方法針對的是圖像生成，而相對較少明確針對圖像到視頻的擴散模型（VDMs），且大多數主要集中在基於UNet的架構上。因此，它們對擴散Transformer（DiT）模型的有效性仍然大部分未被探索，因為這些模型顯示出改進的特徵保留和更強的時間一致性，這得益於更大的容量和先進的注意力機制。在這項工作中，我們介紹了Anti-I2V，這是一種針對惡意人類圖像到視頻生成的新型防禦，適用於各種擴散骨幹。Anti-I2V不僅限於RGB空間的噪聲更新，還在$L$*$a$*$b$*和頻率域中運作，提高了魯棒性並專注於顯著像素。我們隨後確定了在去噪過程中捕捉到最明顯語義特徵的網絡層，以設計適當的訓練目標，最大化時間一致性和生成保真度的退化。通過廣泛的驗證，Anti-I2V展示了對各種視頻擴散模型的最先進防禦性能，提供了一個有效的解決方案。
2603.24570.author: Duc Vu et.al.
2603.24570.authors: Duc Vu, Anh Nguyen, Chi Tran, Anh Tran
